fav.title: My Favorite Animals | Online Zoo
fav.heading: My Favorite Animals
fav.empty_text: Go explore the zoo and heart your favorite pets.
map.title: FIND WHERE THE ANIMALS LIVE
hero.title: Watch your favorite animal
hero.description: Explore the exciting and mysterious world of wild animals in a natural setting without leaving your home.
welcome.title: Welcome to the Online Zoo!
welcome.text: On our website, using live webcams, fans of all ages can observe various animals. Among them, are Giant pandas, eagles, alligators, forest gorillas, African lions, and others. It is the whole natural world in real-time in front of our cameras. We hope you will enjoy watching closely and explore animals' behavior and habitats! Note: animals are not always on view on cameras, so please check back if you don't see anything.
work.title: How we work
work.text: Online Zoo is a nonprofit committed to inspiring awareness and preservation of nature and wild animals in our zoo and worldwide. Every day, our experts work to safeguard the health and wellness of the animals. To continue these efforts, we need your help. We're so grateful to our numerous supporters. All donations, large and small, go a long way to the conservation efforts of our pets.
donation.title: Your donation makes a difference!
donation.text: The Online Zoo's animal webcams are some of the most famous on the internet. Tune in to watch your favourite animals — live, 24/7!
quick_donate.title: Quick Donate
pets.title: Meet some our Pets
pets.subtitle: Do you have a special place in your heart for animals? Who are your favorites? Perhaps you'd like to donate to special ones or all our pets? We think it's important for you to choose how your donation is used.
pet.desc.panda: Native to central China, giant pandas have come to symbolize vulnerable species.
pet.desc.lemur: Lemurs are considered the world's most endangered group of mammals.
pet.desc.gorilla: Variety of snacks very important for the healthy life of gorillas and his plenty of babies.
pet.desc.eagle: Pair of eagle parents lay and protect eggs, feed their chicks and teach them to hunt and fly.
pet.desc.alligator: Alligators live in freshwater environments, such as ponds, marshes, wetlands, rivers, lakes, and swamps.
pet.desc.koala: Koalas are arboreal herbivorous marsupials native to Australia.
pet.desc.lion: Lions are the only cats that live in groups, which are called prides.
pet.desc.tiger: Sumatran tigers are the smallest of all tigers and are found only on the Indonesian island of Sumatra.
contact.heading: GET IN TOUCH
contact.paragraph:
Whether you have a question, or would like to say hello, we're happy to hear from you. Please use the form to send us a message and we'll get back to you as soon as we can.

Whether you have a question, or would like to say hello, we're happy to hear from you. Please use the form to send us a message and we'll get back to you as soon as we can.
zoos.hero.title: Live Panda Cams
zoos.donation.title: make the Bamboo Donation!
zoos.donation.desc: Our process for bamboo donations first starts with a site evaluation. It is important that our team sees where the bamboo is growing, then determining if the bamboo is a species that our animals are currently eating. Thank you for your interest in donating bamboo for our pandas.
zoos.quick_donate.title: Quick Donate
